definition: 形容沉迷于低质量网络内容（尤其是短视频）导致的精神消耗、注意力下降的状态。也指那些让人
的无聊但又停不下来的网络内容。

dialogue.speaker1: Dude, I've been scrolling TikTok for 5 hours straight...
dialogue.speaker2: Classic brain rot. Your attention span is literally gone now.
dialogue.speaker1: I can't even read a paragraph without reaching for my phone. It's so bad.
dialogue.speaker2: Time to do some digital detox before your brain fully rots 💀

examples: After binge-watching funny videos all morning, I think I have total brain rot.
My brain is so rotted from TikTok, I can't even focus on homework anymore.
Stop watching that brain rot and go touch some grass!
collocations: full brain rot（彻底脑子融化）
caught brain rot（确诊脑子融化）
cultural_note: 2024年牛津词典年度词汇，由Henry David Thoreau在1854年《瓦尔登湖》中首次使用。2023-2024年间使用频率增长230%。
